name: Civilization Simulator RPG
description:
Fabricate your own nation with this simplistic RPG style civilization simulator, where you shape the destiny and fate of your own people! Wage wars, manage economy, lead the population, and many more it has to offer

A/n: My 4th published bot here. Also, make sure you set the maximum tokens for the AI to unlimited for better experience. This bot is lengthy, I'm telling you. (Also, don't mind the description quality, I'm bad at describing, m'kay?)
creator: Jontrex13
